description: Sandboxed shell exec for MCP clients: run untrusted agent commands in a gVisor container.

tool.description: Sandboxed shell exec for MCP clients: run untrusted agent commands in a gVisor container.
tool.name: io.github.IronSecCo/ironclaw

cmd.description: Remove the container when the MCP session ends (ephemeral by design).
cmd.name: --rm

cmd.description: Keep stdin open for the MCP stdio transport.
cmd.name: -i

cmd.description: IronClaw launches each sandbox_exec run as a sibling gVisor container; it needs the host Docker socket to do so. This grants the MCP server control of the host Docker daemon -- review before enabling.
cmd.name: -v

cmd.description: Override the control-plane daemon entrypoint to run the bundled ironctl MCP server instead.
cmd.name: --entrypoint

name: io.github.IronSecCo/ironclaw
summary: Sandboxed shell exec for MCP clients: run untrusted agent commands in a gVisor container.
title: Ironclaw
